why: A trade_date/exchange/symbol partitioned layout lets Phase111 discover distinct dates and lets Phase96 validate each day.
Phase110 requires at least 5 ready real anchor days before replay can even be considered.
10 ready real days is the preferred target for more stable calibration evidence.
The full-symbol realism gate compares the fixed 32-symbol universe.
Discovery, readiness validation, and replay-unlock status must be refreshed after new real data arrives.
